title: ENEOS Supplies Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) to American Airlines
content: ENEOS Corporation announces that it has supplied American Airlines, Inc. with Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF). The SAF, which is derived from used cooking oil, is scheduled to be supplied on American Airlinesâ€™ flights from Haneda to New York and will represent Americanâ€™s first delivery of SAF in Japan. ENEOS is building an integrated system for SAF, from Feedstock procurement to in-house manufacturing and sales.
author: Analysts Account
